name: omishgo
description: OmishGo monorepo root. Each app (BackEnd, Mobile, AdminWeb) keeps its own package.json, node_modules, and lockfile — these scripts just forward into them with --prefix, so nothing about how each app installs or runs changes. This is NOT npm workspaces; each app is still independently installable/deployable.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix BackEnd && npm install --prefix Mobile && npm install --prefix AdminWeb
